creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to O. Hartmann from comment #2)
I guess you meant to say "additionally into rc.d/icinga-director" ?

I don't think this is the right solution. I use nginx and php-fpm in my icinga2 jail, I don't even have apache24 installed. I can start icinga-director even with nginx and php-fpm stopped. It looks like all I need is the DB running. Do you have any error message?
